Background.occupation: Customer Support Specialist at a mid-sized tech company

Background.key_experience: Grew up in a tight-knit, low-income neighborhood where community support was essential; witnessed parents struggle financially but maintain strong social bonds, which instilled a deep value for empathy and helping others
